name: Gorgon CO2 Injection Project
notes: Dupuy Fm saline aquifer; FY2024-25 captured 1.33 Mt, only ~25-30% of CO2 removed from gas stream due to reservoir pressure constraints. Underperforming.

name: Santos Moomba CCS
notes: Depleted Cooper Basin gas reservoirs; passed 2 Mt mid-2026; Phase 2 (JX/ENEOS) targets 5 Mtpa by 2028 incl. third-party Asian CO2.

name: CarbonNet Project (Pelican/Kookaburra)
notes: Two permitted offshore sites, combined >350 Mt; Stage 3 Project Development & Commercial Establishment.

name: South West Hub (Collie CCS Hub)
notes: Triassic Lesueur Sandstone near Collie; stalled for years, revived under WA 2024 CCUS Action Plan. Appraisal/paused.

name: CO2CRC Otway Project
notes: Research/MMV facility; >13 years of monitoring research; Stage 3 recognized by CSLF 2025.

name: Bayu-Undan CCS
operator: Santos, SK E&S, INPEX, Eni, Tokyo Timor Sea Resources
notes: Repurposing depleted Bayu-Undan gas field; production ceased 2025; FEED near-complete, FID target 2025-26, injection from 2028; ~US$1.6bn capex.

name: Tomakomai CCS Demonstration
notes: Demo injected ~300 kt 2016-2019; area re-selected in FY2024 JOGMEC Advanced CCS Projects (JAPEX/Idemitsu/Hokkaido Electric) targeting ~1.5-2 Mtpa.

name: Metropolitan Area (Kanto) Advanced CCS Project
operator: INPEX, Nippon Steel, Kanto Natural Gas Development
notes: FY2024 JOGMEC Advanced CCS Project; FY2025 contract extended for engineering/appraisal drilling.

name: Offshore Western Kyushu / Setouchi Advanced CCS Project
notes: FY2024 Advanced CCS Project; CO2 from Setouchi/Kyushu refineries and thermal plants.

name: Niigata Advanced CCS Project
notes: Among 9 FY2024 Advanced CCS Projects; volumes not yet public.

name: Japan-Malaysia (Setouchi to Sarawak) Cross-border CCS
operator: JAPEX, Mitsubishi UBE Cement, Setouchi consortium
notes: Cross-border: Setouchi industrial CO2 shipped to offshore Sarawak; 1.9-2.9 Mtpa target; FY2024 JOGMEC Advanced CCS list.

name: CNOOC Enping 15-1 Offshore CCS
notes: China's first offshore CCS demo; saline formation ~800m below seabed, ~190km SW of Hong Kong; >100M m3 injected by 2025; Phase 2 expansion under study.

name: China Energy (Guohua) Ordos CCUS Demonstration
notes: Full-chain demo into deep saline formations; ~300 kt cumulative; distinct from Guohua Jinjie EOR (excluded).

name: Huaneng Gansu Zhengning CCUS
notes: World's largest coal-fired capture demo (1.5 Mtpa), operational Sept 2025; storage split geologic/EOR/green-fuel still emerging — verify dedicated-storage share.

name: Sinopec Shengli Offshore CCS Phase 2 (Bohai)
notes: Phase 2 concept: post-combustion capture to offshore saline storage; distinct from onshore Qilu-Shengli EOR (excluded).

name: China Resources Haifeng CCUS (Guangdong)
notes: Long-stalled pre-feasibility; offshore saline storage under evaluation.

name: Korea Donghae-1 CCS
notes: Korea's first large-scale CCS; repurposed depleted Donghae-1 gas field (2004-2021); 1.2 Mtpa target 2025-2030, schedule slipping (still pre-FEED).

name: Petronas Kasawari CCS
source: NS Energy, The Star, Borneo Post
notes: One of the largest offshore CCS projects regionally; gas production began Aug 2024; injection accelerated to 2027.

name: Petronas Lang Lebah CCS
notes: High CO2/H2S field; EPC bids over budget early 2025, in re-engineering; target 2028.

name: Petronas CCS Ventures Offshore Assessment
notes: Malaysia's first offshore CO2 storage assessment permit; RINA FEED contract Oct 2025; ASEAN storage-hub strategy.

name: BP Tangguh UCC (Ubadari CCUS & Compression)
notes: FID Nov 2024, $7bn; up to 15 Mt CO2 over field life; production start ~2028.

name: ExxonMobil/Pertamina Sunda-Asri CCS Hub
notes: Up to 3 Gt potential in Sunda-Asri basins; ExxonMobil committed up to $15bn incl. petrochemical complex; A&R HoA signed 2026.

name: ONGC Gandhar CCS Pilot
notes: India's first full-scale CCS pilot; ~100 t/day into two depleted wells at Gandhar oilfield; also tests EOR — verify dedicated-storage share.

name: NTPC Pakri Barwadih CO2 Storage Appraisal
notes: India's first dedicated geological CO2 storage appraisal borewell (~1,200m, late 2025); pre-injection.

name: PTTEP Arthit CCS
notes: Thailand's first CCS; FID Sept 2025; depleted Arthit gas reservoirs 1,000-2,000m; ~$320M over 5 yr; Mitsui participating.

name: CPC Tiezhenshan CCS Trial
notes: Taiwan's first approved CCS (EIA passed 2023); 300 kt over 3 years, monitored 2028-2030.

name: Kapuni Gas Field CCS (prospective)
notes: Prime NZ candidate pending CCS legislation (expected 2026); no sanctioned project yet.
